news.title: The growing problem of ‘skill fishing’ in the hiring world
news.description: [THE GLOBE AND MAIL] As AI and skills-based hiring reshape recruitment, some candidates are overstating their proficiency in sought-after skills such as artificial intelligence, coding and data analysis, a practice experts call ‘skill fishing’

news.title: From space rovers to hunger maps: How AI is reshaping humanitarian aid
news.description: [EURONEWS] Artificial intelligence (AI) is often discussed for its potential threats to humanity. But humanitarian organisations are using it to predict hunger, map destruction and deliver aid without sending people into danger.

news.title: India's Tata Consultancy Services plans up to 8,900 AI deployment engineers, seeks AI acquisitions
news.description: [REUTERS] Tata Consultancy Services is building a team of up to 8,900 forward-deployed engineers ‌and hunting for AI acquisitions as it bets artificial intelligence will create new business rather than undermine outsourcing, two TCS executives told Reuters.
